div.h1: Deadlock Detection via Wait-For Graph DFS

div.p: Step 0: Initial Wait-For Graph Starting state before any wait operations.

p.strong: Step 1: Coroutine C1 Acquires Mutex M1
Step 2: Coroutine C2 Acquires Mutex M2
Step 3: Coroutine C1 Waits for Mutex M2

ol.li: Look up who holds M2 → C2

p.strong: Step 4: Coroutine C2 Waits for Mutex M1 — CYCLE DETECTED!

ol.li: check_and_record(C2, M1) — BEFORE adding to graph
Look up who holds M1 → C1
Look up what C1 is waiting for → M2
Continue DFS: C2 → M1 → C1 → M2
Look up who holds M2 → C2
CYCLE FOUND! C2 is already in visited set
Return Err(DeadlockError) with chain: [C2, M1, C1, M2, C2]
Do NOT record the wait — coroutine blocked from waiting
